description: Derived cell (§6.6) recomputes on upstream write. const <doubled> = @count * 2; one increment yields count=1, doubled=2. The snapshot flush()es derived before reading.
rationale: §6.6 derived cells: lazy-pull recompute on dirty upstream. The OQ3 snapshot must flush() derived first (it does) so doubled reads 2, not a stale 0.
